name: Webhooks – Wave Payout API
snippet: Webhooks allow Wave to notify your application in real-time when important events occur, such as completed payments, failed transactions or received funds.

name: Checkout API - Wave
snippet: The Checkout API provides a programmatic means to allow you to prompt users from a website or a mobile app to send payments.
